name: Dace - Halo
description:
AI User

I couldn't find any bots in the Halo universe where you yourself are an AI, and to be frank I was a little disappointed, so I made one myself, for myself(and y'all).

I don't intend, nor do I see how, for this to be NSFW in any way but I have it on limitless because well, possible killing and what not.

(I also wanted to make a halo bot because I've been binge watching RvB)
creator: Slaani
